diagnostic.title: Compliance Diagnostic
diagnostic.intro: Our diagnostic engine analyses your organisation's profile and recommends the most suitable compliance frameworks — ISO 27001, GDPR, NIS2, RGPC and others.
diagnostic.resultsSubtitle: Based on your answers, we recommend the following frameworks:

vendors.title: Vendor Management
vendors.subtitle: Third-party risk control and GDPR data processors
vendors.findingsPlaceholder: Describe the main findings of the assessment...

soa.title: Statement of Applicability (SoA)
soa.subtitle: ISO 27001:2022 — 93 controls in 4 themes
soa.implementationNotesPlaceholder: Describe how this control is implemented...
soa.exclusionJustificationPlaceholder: Justify why this control is not applicable...
soa.legalNotice: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 — Annex A Controls — This document is confidential and subject to periodic review. Score = (Implemented + Partial × 0.5) / Applicable × 100

dora.title: DORA
dora.subtitle: Digital Operational Resilience Act (EU 2022/2554)
dora.impactPlaceholder: Describe the operational and financial impact

policies.descriptionSubtitle: Manage the lifecycle of your organization's policies and procedures
policies.noPoliciesDesc: Create the first policy for the organization
policies.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of the purpose of this policy
policies.contentPlaceholder: Write the full content of the policy here...

gdpr.breachesDescription: Personal data breaches — 72h notification obligation (Art. 33 GDPR)

gdpr.necessityTestPlaceholder: Justify the necessity of the processing...
gdpr.mitigationMeasuresPlaceholder: Describe measures to mitigate the risks...

nis2.title: NIS2 — Compliance
nis2.subtitle: Directive (EU) 2022/2555 — Assessment of 15 Article 21 measures and notification obligations
nis2.notesPlaceholder: Additional notes or action plan to achieve compliance...
nis2.legalNotice: NIS2 Scope: The NIS2 Directive applies to essential and important entities in the sectors of energy, transport, banking, financial market infrastructure, health, water, digital infrastructure, ICT services, public administration and space.

denuncias.menacSubtitle: National Anti-Corruption Mechanism — Mandatory Annual Report
denuncias.legalNoticeTitle: ⚠️ Legal obligation to report to MENAC
denuncias.legalNoticeDesc: Under Article 22 of Law 93/2021, obligated entities must submit the annual report to MENAC by 31 March each year for the previous year. This report must be submitted via the

trustCenter.title: Public Trust Center
trustCenter.subtitle: Shareable public page showing your organization's compliance status
trustCenter.statusPublic: Your Trust Center is public and accessible via link
trustCenter.statusHidden: Your Trust Center is hidden — only you can see the page
trustCenter.customMessagePlaceholder: Our organization is committed to the highest standards of compliance and security...
trustCenter.toggleFrameworksDesc: Shows active frameworks and progress score
trustCenter.toggleAuditsDesc: Number of audits and last completed audit
trustCenter.togglePoliciesDesc: Number of active and approved policies
trustCenter.toggleRisksDesc: Risk register information (caution with sensitive data)
trustCenter.howToUseTitle: How to use the Trust Center
trustCenter.howToUseDesc: Share the public link with potential clients, partners or auditors to demonstrate your compliance status transparently. Only the data you enable here will be visible. No employee personal data or sensitive information will be shared.

security.title: Change Password
security.subtitle: Use a strong password with at least 8 characters
security.twoFASubtitle: Add an extra layer of security to your account.

translationsPage.title: Translation Management
translationsPage.subtitle: Edit translations manually or use DeepL for automatic translation
translationsPage.deeplNote: To use automatic translation with DeepL, configure DEEPL_API_KEY in the server .env.production file. Manual overrides take priority over automatic translations.
translationsPage.footer: {total} translation keys · {overrides} active manual overrides for {locale}

aiAssistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask about compliance, risks, frameworks… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
aiAssistant.footer: Powered by Claude AI · Responses based on your organization's real data
aiAssistant.fallbackError: Error contacting the assistant. Please verify ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is configured on the server.
aiAssistant.initialMessage:
Hello! I'm **iComply AI**, your compliance assistant.

I have access to your organization's current status and can help you with:
- Compliance status analysis
- Framework requirements (ISO 27001, GDPR, NIS2, DORA)
- Task and risk prioritization
- Regulatory requirement interpretation

How can I help?
aiAssistant.resetMessage: Conversation reset. How can I help?
aiAssistant.prompt1Prompt: What is my organization's current compliance status? Give me an executive summary.
aiAssistant.prompt2Prompt: What are the most critical risks I need to resolve urgently?
aiAssistant.prompt3Prompt: What do I need to do to advance in ISO 27001 certification? Which controls are priority?
aiAssistant.prompt4Prompt: What evidence is pending or missing for the next audit?
aiAssistant.prompt5Prompt: Are we compliant with GDPR? What are the key points to watch in the ROPA and DPIAs?
aiAssistant.prompt6Prompt: What are the main DORA and NIS2 obligations we still need to address?

excelImport.downloadTemplatesDesc: Download the corresponding Excel template, fill it in and import your data.
